title: Weekend Escape in Brno
description: First trip in Czechia outside of Prague, it is a charming surprise. The city has a relaxed vibe, with a mix of architectural styles and a lively café culture. It's the perfect place for a weekend escape.
coverAlt: Ornate Neo-Gothic building facade on a sunlit cobblestone street with tram tracks in Brno's old town

images.alt: Ornate Neo-Gothic building facade on a sunlit Brno street with tram wires overhead and pedestrians walking past
images.caption: Afternoon light on the old town.

images.alt: Vast underground water cistern with rows of concrete columns and vaulted ceilings lit by warm floor spotlights
images.caption: Beneath the city: Brno's underground water tanks, cathedral-like in their stillness.
